name: jira
description: Integration for Jira Cloud. Covers issues, comments, projects, users, boards, sprints, worklogs, issue links, watchers, and field metadata using the Jira REST API v3 and Agile API v1.

create_issue.description: Create a new Jira issue. Supports all standard fields including summary, description, assignee, priority, labels, parent (for subtasks), and custom fields.

projectKey.description: The project key to create the issue in (e.g. 'PROJ').

issueType.description: Issue type name. Defaults to 'Task'. Common values: Task, Bug, Story, Epic, Subtask.

description.description: Issue description as plain text. Converted to Atlassian Document Format automatically.

assigneeAccountId.description: Atlassian account ID of the assignee. Use search_users to find account IDs.

priority.description: Priority name. Common values: Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest.

labels.description: List of labels to apply to the issue.

parentKey.description: Parent issue key. Required for Subtask issue types.

customFields.description: Additional custom fields to set as a key-value map. Keys are Jira field IDs (e.g. 'customfield_10014').

get_issue.description: Retrieve full details of a Jira issue by its key or ID, including status, assignee, reporter, priority, labels, components, fix versions, subtasks, and raw field data.

issueKey.description: The issue key (e.g. 'PROJ-123') or numeric issue ID.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Omit to return all fields.

update_issue.description: Update fields on an existing Jira issue. Supports summary, description, assignee, priority, labels, due date, fix versions, components, and custom fields.

assigneeAccountId.description: Account ID of the new assignee. Pass null to unassign.

labels.description: Replacement label list. Overwrites existing labels.

notifyUsers.description: Whether to notify watchers of the update. Defaults to true.

customFields.description: Custom fields to update as a key-value map.

delete_issue.description: Permanently delete a Jira issue. Optionally delete all subtasks. This action cannot be undone.

deleteSubtasks.description: If true, also deletes all subtasks of this issue. Defaults to false.

search_issues.description: Search for Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Returns paginated results with key issue fields.

jql.description: JQL query string. Examples: 'project = PROJ AND status = Open', 'assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY created DESC'.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 50.

nextPageToken.description: Token for fetching the next page of results. Use the nextPageToken from a previous response.

fields.description: List of fields to include in the response. Defaults to common fields.

nextPageToken.description: Pass this into the next call to get the next page of results.

get_issue_transitions.description: Get all available workflow transitions for a Jira issue. Use this before transition_issue to find valid transition IDs.

transitions.description: List of available transitions with id, name, and target status.

transition_issue.description: Move a Jira issue to a new workflow status using a transition ID. Use get_issue_transitions first to discover available transition IDs. Optionally add a comment and set a resolution.

transitionId.description: The transition ID. Get this from get_issue_transitions.

comment.description: Optional comment to add when transitioning.

resolution.description: Optional resolution name for Done transitions (e.g. 'Fixed', 'Won\'t Do', 'Duplicate').

assign_issue.description: Assign a Jira issue to a user by account ID. Pass null for accountId to unassign, or '-1' to use the project default assignee.

accountId.description: Atlassian account ID to assign to. Pass null to unassign. Use '-1' for the project default assignee.

add_comment.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue. Optionally restrict visibility to a specific role or group.

visibilityValue.description: Role or group name for visibility restriction.

get_comments.description: Retrieve all comments on a Jira issue, paginated. Returns author details, timestamps, and comment body.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of comments to return. Defaults to 50.

update_comment.description: Update the body of an existing comment on a Jira issue.

commentId.description: The numeric comment ID. Get this from get_comments.

body.description: New comment text as plain text.

visibilityValue.description: Role or group name for visibility restriction.

delete_comment.description: Permanently delete a comment from a Jira issue.

commentId.description: The numeric comment ID to delete.

list_projects.description: List all Jira projects accessible to the authenticated user. Supports pagination, filtering by project type, and name search.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of projects to return. Defaults to 50.

query.description: Filter by project name or key.

get_project.description: Get detailed information about a Jira project including issue types, components, versions, and project lead.

projectKey.description: The project key (e.g. 'PROJ') or numeric project ID.

get_project_components.description: List all components defined for a Jira project.

get_project_versions.description: List all versions (releases) for a Jira project, paginated.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of versions to return. Defaults to 50.

create_project_version.description: Create a new version (release) for a Jira project.

released.description: Whether this version is already released. Defaults to false.

get_current_user.description: Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user.

get_user.description: Retrieve a Jira user's profile by account ID.

accountId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the user.

search_users.description: Search for Jira users by display name or email. Returns account IDs needed for assignee and watcher operations.

query.description: Search query — name or email fragment.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results. Defaults to 50.

list_boards.description: List all Jira boards (Scrum or Kanban) accessible to the authenticated user. Filter by type or project.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of boards to return. Defaults to 50.

projectKeyOrId.description: Filter boards by project key or ID.

get_sprints.description: List all sprints for a Jira board. Filter by state: active, future, or closed.

boardId.description: The board ID. Get this from list_boards.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of sprints to return. Defaults to 50.

get_sprint_issues.description: Get all issues assigned to a specific Jira sprint.

sprintId.description: The sprint ID. Get this from get_sprints.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of issues. Defaults to 50.

jql.description: Additional JQL to filter sprint issues.

fields.description: Fields to include in the response.

add_worklog.description: Log time spent on a Jira issue. Supports all estimate adjustment modes: auto, new, manual, leave.

timeSpent.description: Time spent in Jira duration format (e.g. '3h', '1d 2h', '30m').

started.description: When work started, in Jira datetime format (e.g. '2024-01-15T09:00:00.000+0000'). Defaults to now.

newEstimate.description: New remaining estimate. Required when adjustEstimate is 'new'.

reduceBy.description: Amount to reduce estimate by. Required when adjustEstimate is 'manual'.

get_worklogs.description: Retrieve all work log entries for a Jira issue.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of worklogs to return. Defaults to 50.

link_issues.description: Create a link between two Jira issues. Use get_issue_link_types to discover available link type names (e.g. 'Blocks', 'Cloners', 'Relates').

linkType.description: Link type name (e.g. 'Blocks', 'Cloners', 'Duplicate', 'Relates'). Use get_issue_link_types to list all available types.

inwardIssueKey.description: The inward issue key (e.g. 'PROJ-123'). For 'Blocks', this is the blocking issue.

outwardIssueKey.description: The outward issue key (e.g. 'PROJ-456'). For 'Blocks', this is the blocked issue.

comment.description: Optional comment to add with the link.

get_issue_link_types.description: Retrieve all available issue link types defined in this Jira instance (e.g. Blocks, Cloners, Duplicate, Relates).

add_watcher.description: Add a user as a watcher on a Jira issue.

accountId.description: Atlassian account ID of the user to add as watcher.

get_watchers.description: Get the list of users watching a Jira issue.

get_issue_types.description: Retrieve issue types available in this Jira instance or for a specific project.

projectKey.description: Optional project key. When provided, returns issue types with their available statuses for that project.

get_priorities.description: Retrieve all issue priority values defined in this Jira instance.

get_fields.description: Retrieve all fields available in this Jira instance, including custom fields. Use customOnly to filter to just custom fields.

customOnly.description: If true, return only custom fields. Defaults to false.

get_issue_changelog.description: Retrieve the full change history of a Jira issue — every field that was changed, when, and by whom.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of changelog entries to return. Defaults to 100.

bulk_create_issues.description: Create up to 50 Jira issues in a single request.

issues.description: List of issue definitions to create. Maximum 50.

created.description: List of created issues with id and key.

get_board_issues.description: Get all issues on a Jira board (all sprints combined). Supports JQL filtering and pagination.

boardId.description: The board ID. Get this from list_boards.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of issues. Defaults to 50.

get_backlog_issues.description: Get all issues in the backlog of a Jira board (issues not assigned to any sprint).

boardId.description: The board ID. Get this from list_boards.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of issues. Defaults to 50.

move_issues_to_sprint.description: Move one or more issues into a specific sprint.

issueKeys.description: List of issue keys to move (e.g. ['PROJ-1', 'PROJ-2']).

create_sprint.description: Create a new sprint on a Jira Scrum board.

boardId.description: The board ID to create the sprint on.

startDate.description: Sprint start date in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: Sprint end date in ISO 8601 format.

update_sprint.description: Update a sprint's name, state, dates, or goal. Use state='active' to start a sprint or state='closed' to complete it.

startDate.description: New start date in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: New end date in ISO 8601 format.

get_project_roles.description: List all roles defined for a Jira project (e.g. Developer, Administrator, Viewer).

get_status_categories.description: Retrieve all status categories in this Jira instance (To Do, In Progress, Done).

list_dashboards.description: List all dashboards accessible to the authenticated user. Optionally filter by 'my' or 'favourite'.

filter.description: Filter dashboards: 'my' for owned dashboards, 'favourite' for starred dashboards. Omit for all.

get_dashboard.description: Retrieve full details of a specific dashboard by its ID.

search_dashboards.description: Search for dashboards by name, owner account ID, or group. Returns paginated results.

dashboardName.description: Partial or full dashboard name to search for.

owner.description: Filter by owner username (deprecated — prefer accountId).

groupId.description: Filter by group ID that has permission to view the dashboard.

get_dashboard_gadgets.description: List all gadgets on a specific dashboard. Returns each gadget's type, title, and position.
